page_metadata.biotools__summary: DomArchive is a data package compiling dominance interaction data published over a century of research. The goal of the package is to facilitate comparative research on the structure and function of dominance hierarchies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DomArchive is a data package compiling dominance interaction data published over a century of research. The goal of the package is to facilitate comparative research on the structure and function of dominance hierarchies.
